---
description: "Review C# code against the project's Clean Architecture, security, SOLID, and performance checklist."
---

Review the selected or attached code against the project's quality checklist.

Report issues grouped by severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low) with the specific rule violated and a suggested fix.

Follow the rules in:

- [dotnet-code-review.instructions.md](../instructions/dotnet-code-review.instructions.md)
- [dotnet-code-generation.instructions.md](../instructions/dotnet-code-generation.instructions.md)
